purpose: Describe broad A-share risk conditions with nine fixed local-market aggregates without affecting any strategy or position.

time_and_alignment_contract.ordered_universe_count: positive exact integer equal to every anonymous outer-row and flag count
time_and_alignment_contract.ordered_universe_digests: prices, amount, limit-down and suspension each carry a lowercase 64-hex digest; all four must be identical
time_and_alignment_contract.digest_meaning: hash of the exact anonymous ordered-universe identity held outside the module; the module never receives constituent identifiers
time_and_alignment_contract.mismatch_behavior: block all nine components without a score

input_shape.benchmark_history: exactly 121 ordered accepted-session positive qfq_close values bound one-to-one to accepted_session_dates
input_shape.stock_price_history: same anonymous ordered universe, each row exactly 61 positive qfq_close values bound to stock_price_session_dates
input_shape.stock_amount_history: same anonymous ordered universe, each row exactly 21 nonnegative CNY amount values bound to stock_amount_session_dates; prior 20 values must be positive
input_shape.flags: same anonymous ordered universe, one exact boolean is_limit_down and is_suspended value bound to flag_session_date
input_shape.security_identifiers: forbidden in module input and output

components_in_exact_order.formula: sample standard deviation ddof=1 of the latest 20 benchmark log differences multiplied by sqrt(252)
sample standard deviation ddof=1 of the latest 60 benchmark log differences multiplied by sqrt(252)
expm1(log(benchmark_close_t) - log(maximum benchmark close over t-120 through t))
share of anonymous stocks where log(stock_close_t) - log(stock_close_t_minus_60) is greater than 0
share of anonymous stocks with stock_close_t strictly above the overflow-safe arithmetic mean of the prior 60 closes excluding t
share of anonymous stocks with amount_t greater than or equal to the median of the prior 20 positive CNY amounts excluding t
share of anonymous stocks with is_limit_down true at as_of
share of anonymous stocks with is_suspended true at as_of

aggregation.weights: equal 1/9 weight in the exact component order
aggregation.risk_score: round(finite sum of nine finite component contribution points, 6)
aggregation.finite_gate: every raw value, log difference, volatility, ratio-equivalent return, unit risk, contribution and score must be finite before SHADOW_READY
aggregation.confidence: 1.0 only when every component is complete, aligned, finite and current; otherwise 0.0 and no score or level

staleness_and_missing_behavior.generated_at: timezone-aware computation timestamp not earlier than as_of
staleness_and_missing_behavior.stale_behavior: list all nine components as stale and emit no score, level or contributions
staleness_and_missing_behavior.missing_behavior: list every unavailable component and emit no score, level or contributions
staleness_and_missing_behavior.nonfinite_derived_behavior: mark the affected component unavailable and block the whole record
staleness_and_missing_behavior.temporal_or_digest_mismatch: list all nine components as unavailable and block the whole record

output.maximum_frequency: one aggregate record per ISO week
